rationale: In the citing paper, Ghosh and John (2005) is cited once in a grouped list of examples where proactive vendor involvement in customization has been observed. The paper does not assign this source a distinct conceptual, methodological, or empirical role in building hypotheses, measurement, model specification, or interpretation of results. Because the citation functions as contextual background rather than as a specific building block, its role is best classified as a passing mention.
